findings.line: The pace had shortened within minutes, not hours.
findings.deletionTest: The pace had shortened within minutes.
findings.reason: Pattern 1 direct contrast pivot; the negative half is removable scaffolding because the sentence still carries the timing change once it starts at 'within minutes.'
findings.suggestedFix: The pace had shortened within minutes.

findings.subject: danger
findings.realAgent: Jaina's plain words through the wall carried the warning about Frostmourne.
findings.reason: Pattern 5: the sentence launders the warning onto an abstraction instead of naming the words or report that are doing the carrying.
findings.suggestedFix: So did the warning about what waited upstairs.

findings.line: Every helpful stranger, every contact with just the right piece, every road pointed half a degree in the useful direction—
findings.subject: road

findings.reason: Pattern 1: geography is carrying deliberate directional pressure that belongs to the infiltrator's manipulation.
findings.suggestedFix: Every helpful stranger, every contact with just the right piece, every route had been steered half a degree in the useful direction—
